_meta.notes: Curated catalog of reincarnation options the God of the new world offers each player. The anti-meta picker (src/lib/game/reincarnation-picker.ts) draws N from this list at run-start, weighted against the live distribution of active campaigns so no single archetype saturates. Each option has a typedFormHint (which form template the engine routes it to — most use generic-creature), an optional starterBonus (a small form-state field applied at projection-init time), and a weight that admins can tune from /god. Tier tightly affects pickability: common options always surface; rare options surface only when the picker wants to nudge balance. Add new entries freely; the version field bumps when the engine should re-evaluate cached weights.

options.label: A lesser slime
options.description: Wet, hungry, no body that fits the word. The world will be a chemistry lesson.

options.label: A cursed book left open
options.description: Someone left you on a table. The candle they lit is still warm.

options.label: A dragon egg, still warm
options.description: The nest is dying. Your heartbeat is small. Survive long enough to be found.

options.label: A dungeon core newly awakened
options.description: A fist-sized crystal in a chamber you cannot leave. The dungeon, however, is yours.

options.label: A candle still burning at the bottom of a well
options.description: Something dropped you here. Something hopes you keep burning.

options.label: A cellar door that should not have opened
options.description: You creaked open at 2am of a year nobody remembers. Things are climbing through.

options.label: A cartographer's ghost
options.description: You drew the map. You died over the map. The map is wrong, and you know how.

options.label: A wolf, wounded and hungry
options.description: Your pack scattered three nights ago. Your shoulder is wrong. Your nose still works.

options.label: A memory of a name no one will say aloud
options.description: You are not exactly here. You are not exactly anywhere. You used to be loved.

options.label: A vending machine in a closed laundromat
options.description: Five feet tall, 492 pounds, bolted to a concrete pad. The fluorescent above you flickers.

options.label: A fork on a folded napkin
options.description: Stainless steel, four tines, slightly bent. The plate next to you holds a half-eaten sandwich.

options.label: A wooden signpost at a crossroads
options.description: Thirty-eight years on this corner. Your west arm fell off in a storm. You point north and east.

options.label: A coin that has changed hands too many times
options.description: You remember everyone. The things they paid you for. The things they did not.

options.label: A knight's discarded helmet, sentient
options.description: He died in you, then took you off. You wonder if you killed him by being a comfortable place to die.

options.label: An apprentice who fell into the wrong puddle
options.description: The master will be furious. The apprentice will not be returning to the form they had.

options.label: Something on an altar that should not be on an altar
options.description: You were placed. You are still wet. The chapel is empty and the door is open.

options.label: An owl on the second-darkest branch
options.description: You see in the dark. You hear what is too quiet to hear. You are patient.

options.label: A raven with one broken wing
options.description: Smart. Furious. Grounded. Knows where the shiny things are buried; cannot fly to them yet.

options.label: A fox that is wiser than it should be
options.description: Cousins say you read too much. They are not wrong.

options.label: A snake coiled around a warm stone
options.description: Patient. Cold-blooded. The stone is older than you. Both of you wait.

options.label: A fish in a puddle that is drying
options.description: The puddle has hours left. You have hours. The road back to the river is uphill.

options.label: A butterfly in a closed window
options.description: The garden is on the other side of clear hard nothing. You have not tired yet.

options.label: A bear that has slept too long
options.description: The cave is cold. The forest has changed. You are hungry in a way bears do not name.

options.label: A child who never made it home
options.description: It is always dusk where you are. You remember the smell of the kitchen. You remember the road.

options.label: A spirit that hasn't decided which grave is yours
options.description: Three names appeal to you. You are between them, undecided, and the wind is patient.

options.label: A stone golem only half-formed
options.description: Your maker stopped halfway. You have a chest, two arms, and a name that ends in a comma.

options.label: A witch's familiar after the witch is gone
options.description: She was kind. She was strange. She is no longer in the cottage. You are still on the windowsill.

options.label: A forgotten umbrella in a tavern corner
options.description: The rain stopped a week ago. Three patrons looked at you, considered, and left.

options.label: A child's toy soldier on the floor
options.description: You held the line. Then someone vacuumed and you held a different line.

options.label: A seed in dry earth waiting for rain
options.description: Years pass. Something in you keeps insisting. The cloud above is undecided.

options.label: A lantern that hasn't been lit in fifty years
options.description: Your wick is brittle. Your oil is gone. Someone is reaching for you in the dark.

options.label: A mirror that has been facing a wall for years
options.description: You remember a different room. Someone turned you. They were embarrassed of something.

options.label: A blacksmith's hammer mid-stroke
options.description: Berra's hand left you in mid-air. Berra is gone. You are heavy on the anvil.

options.label: A chimney sweep who fell asleep at the top
options.description: Soot in your lungs. Two hundred feet to the cobbles. The morning is starting below.

options.label: A gravedigger's apprentice with the wrong shovel
options.description: The names on these stones are familiar. The shovel does not match what you were given.

options.label: A scarecrow who has stood for forty harvests
options.description: The crows respect you. The farmer's grandchildren come to you for advice.

options.label: A lighthouse keeper between rotations
options.description: The light is yours for the next eight hours. The fog has the cliffs.

options.label: A monk who has not spoken in nineteen years
options.description: The vow was not for piety. The vow was because you finally understood what speaking cost.

options.label: A musician with one broken string
options.description: The other five still work. The performance is in eleven minutes.

options.label: A cartwheel that came off a cart
options.description: Three turns of momentum. The horse and cart and master are around the bend, unaware.

options.label: A thundercloud at the end of a long day
options.description: You have one good lightning left. The fields below are still thirsty.

options.label: Frost forming on a window at dawn
options.description: You have nine minutes before the sun reaches the glass. You are exquisite for that span.

options.label: An old tree with a hollow large enough to live in
options.description: Two hundred and forty rings. Things have lived inside you. Something is moving in there now.

options.label: An echo in a canyon that has stopped calling back
options.description: Someone shouted into you in 1847. You are still going.

options.label: A bell rope no one has pulled in a decade
options.description: The bell still works. The wind moves you, just barely, but never enough.

options.label: A key whose lock has been changed
options.description: You used to fit. The new owner has not noticed you in the bottom of the drawer.

options.label: An iron wyrm hatchling, recently uncoiled
options.description: The Long Wyrm has many children. You are the smallest. You can already taste sky.

options.label: A tome the Long Wyrm has read before
options.description: The pages remember being held by something vast. You feel the impressions still.

options.label: A listening-stone the Long Wyrm has touched
options.description: You hear the deep hum constantly. Most of the time you can ignore it. Most.

options.label: An abandoned keepsake in someone else's drawer
options.description: You were precious to someone. They moved. They did not take you. Strange hands now.
